mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, nickname, email, avatar, role, points, status, create_time FROM user WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY points DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM user ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, nickname, email, avatar, role, points, status, create_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{points}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET points = points + #{amount} WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_in_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND check_in_date = CURDATE()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO check_in_log (user_id, check_in_date) VALUES (#{userId}, CURDATE())
